form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 3 m fourth behind Layla Shannon at this track over 1730m NR up to 52 M last start. Before that was beaten a nose second again at this track in 3yo+ NR up to 52 FM on March 25. Can be competitive from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had limited racing room in the home straight and was not fully tested.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 55 m by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $34. Before that surrendered the lead and finished 9th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track was 4th-6.92 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Banksy (2:05.10) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $18. Improvement needed.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 2260m at this track beaten 21 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $34. Before that, 8th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track beaten 23 m by Fliptop Bottleshop (2:08.60) in NR up to 53 on March 27 at $19. Looking to others.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 13th (Sr3) over 2000m at Motukarara, beaten 55 m by Dance With The Boss (2:30.10) in 4yo+ on February 16 2025 at $9.20. Former Kiwi whose trials suggest she can kick off with a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered when Penny Weight shifted outwards near the 250m.
Over-raced early stages.
Broke briefly in the score up however was in position at the start.
Crowded by an outside runner near the 1500m striking several track markers.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start won by a neck as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:04.50) beating Rocket Me in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $3 at the bell was 3rd-4.58. In form and looks a player again.

form.formComment: Last start by 2.25 m when quickly away, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:05.30) beating Major Jewel in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $5 at the bell was 4th-4.42. In form and can feature in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 2.25 m when quickly away, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:05.30) beating Major Jewel in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $5 at the bell was 4th-4.42. In form and can feature in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow away when the start was affected.
Checked and broke after the start as a result of Duffy Hollow breaking gait.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Maggie Moth at Young over 1720m in a 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $1.65. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Layla Shannon at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $81. Not here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running until approaching the 100m.
Leaving the 1400m raced rough for a short distance.
Inconvenienced passing the 1400m when the speed in the event eased.
Hung-out near the 200m and under pressure in the home straight.
Hung out under pressure over the final 100m.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at this track over 1730m NR up to 47 on March 4. Last time out surrendered the lead and finished 9th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track well beaten by Go Easy On Me (2:04.40) in NR up to 55 M on March 27 at $18. Capable but may need luck from this draw.

form.formComment: Back in form at the last couple of outings, two starts back won by 5.5 m (Fr1) at Young (2:05.20) beating Bets On Heaven in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $6 at the bell was leading 4.5. Last start just missed, game effort when 2nd (Sr2) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 8th-9.53 beaten 2.25 m by Layla Shannon (2:05.30) in NR up to 52 M on April 1 at $41. Another good performance expected.

Paced roughly leaving the back straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr7) over 2260m after racing wide at this track was 10th-16.36 at the bell, beaten 14 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $7.50. At the start before was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2260m after racing wide at this track, beaten 25 m by Time To Torque (2:47.10) in NR up to 58 on March 27 at $5. Could play a role.
